creator: bc979@lafn.org
text:
I find this quite strange.  A test tonight using FBSD 14 shows that a bad ssh login does get blocked.  However, I can find no change anywhere in the code that would have fixed the issue.   bug #26459 precedes my original report.  Blacklistd.c still shows that BL_BADUSER is ignored.  I can't find any change to sshd.  It still appears to issue BL_BADUSER.


The only difference in my testing is that currently I have passwords disabled.  Only publickey authentication is used.  Passwords were used at the time the PR was filed.
